group_1.narration: "I lost both of my parents in an explosion@at the hospital on the day I was born."
"From as far back as I can remember,@I was taken in by an orphanage@that hosted seminars on self-awakening."
"By that point,@I'd already developed the ability@to sense the troubles of others—@and when the orphanage staff found out,@they turned me into a business."
"Heheh... Looking back, it wasn't really a "business"@so much as volunteer work, huh?"
"Anyway, basically all I did was host bogus@therapy sessions like the one we just had."
"Even if counselling doesn't solve the problem,@merely empathizing with the person@gives you a degree of control."
"The business was a huge success.@We moved into a bigger building,@and I got to eat good food."
"But I became more and more exhausted."
"As my ability to understand people's troubles@continued to grow, I began to experience@the suffering of others every night in my dreams."
"In those dreams, I become someone else.@I get attacked, abused, beaten, burned,@and mangled to death by strangers."
"The pain, suffering, fear, and anger@that tear through "my" body all feel as though@everything is happening to me in real life."
"Can you imagine?"
"Every night, I get killed by someone different.@Every night, I hate someone I don't know."
"Someone who appears refined and gentle,@but doesn't even think of me as a human being."
"Someone who comes off as normal and innocent,@then dismembers me while I'm still alive."
"Someone who slaughters me@without a care in the world."
"Someone who kills me@while they're preoccupied with other worries."
"I lost the ability to tell if anyone@other than myself was good or bad."
"I was terrified that even@the seemingly ordinary people@walking down the street@would suddenly try to kill me."
"It was during that time period@that Kyubey appeared before me..."

group_1.textRight: Your power...
...was probably given to you by your mother@when she made a Magical Girl contract.
And you have the potential to become a Magical@Girl yourself.
If you so choose...
...you could even make a wish to erase that@ability.
I hesitated for a moment, but...@I decided not to go for it, in the end.

group_1.textLeft: I know there's the thing with your mother...
...but I think you really could get rid of your@nightmares with a Magical Girl wish.
And now, thanks to Tamaki-san, you wouldn't@need to worry about becoming a Witch, either...

group_1.textRight: That's true...
But it seems like my nightmares are a side-effect@of my ability to sense others' problems.

group_1.textCenter: Getting rid of the nightmares might erase that@by proxy.
I know I called it a curse...
...but being able to pinpoint other people's@troubles was my whole reason for existing.
And while being so aware of everyone's pain and@worry is agonizing...
...that alone won't tell me...
...whether or not somebody might suddenly turn@into a cold-blooded murderer.
If I were unable to tell what other people were@thinking...
...I'd be too scared to ever set foot outside again.
I tried to tell the staff at the orphanage about my@nightmares once, and they said... I don't know...
...that sharing in the suffering of others is a "trial"@through which I must "save people", I guess?
What a riot, right?
If that were truly the case, then rejecting my@nightmares...
...would mean that I was refusing to help@someone in need, wouldn't it?
At the time, however...
...I latched onto all of that nonsense...
That said...
To be honest, I did think about making a contract@with Kyubey when I first met him.
He was killed before I could answer, though.

group_1.textRight: Ah, whoops? Should I not have?
You looked kinda annoyed...
...so I thought he was pushing his wares again...
Like, trying to get you to make a contract or@something?
I don't know... maybe? Maybe not?

group_1.narration: "Even with my power,@I couldn't tell what was troubling Yuu."
"She never had any worries to begin with."

group_1.textRight: Ah, right, right. Kyubey!
Those little buggers pop up everywhere.
If you find a new one, you can ask it about@becoming a Magical Girl.
A lot of girls regret making contracts, though.
It'd be best to think it over a little more first,@you know?
I became a Magical Girl pretty late...
...so I can't help much.
Why not see if you can find a different Magical@Girl to talk to?
I mean, yeah?
I heard that Magical Girls do good things...
...so I wanted to help you, since you seemed@to be in trouble.
Was I sticking my nose where it doesn't belong?
Oh, whew~ Well, feel free to tell me anything,@okay?
Even if I can't help you, misery loves company,@right?

group_1.narration: "I couldn't imagine that she was being dishonest.@She didn't even have any worries."
"I've known people who told benign lies,@people who lied with good intentions,@and people who couldn't even recognize@that they were lying."
"But despite that,@I had a gut feeling that she'd never lie to me."

group_1.textCenter: I'm Yuu.
Since I'm a Magical Girl, I'm supposed to do@good things, you know?
I'm an awful, empty shell of a person, so I at least@wanna try to do something nice.

group_1.narration: "Eventually,@I asked Yuu to spend time with me."
"She listened to everything I had to say.@About my ability,@about the nightmares it caused,@about how it apparently@came from my mother's wish..."

group_1.textLeft: There's gotta be a reason why your mother...
I don't know if she meant it as a good thing@or a bad thing...
...but either way, if she was willing to put her@life on the line for you by making a contract...
...she must've thought you were a very special girl,@y'know?
In the morning, after you've had a scary dream...
...I'll be right by your side to sing to you so@that you don't have to be scared anymore.

group_1.narration: "Not a day went by where I didn't fret@over the idea of making a Magical Girl contract..."
"But for the first time,@I decided to face my nightmares head-on@before anything else."
"No matter how terrifying,@painful, or difficult it was...@I began to write down@the contents of my dreams in a diary."

group_1.textRight: That...was the first incarnation of Yuu's "[textRed:list]."
